text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hokko Tarumae announces her intention to take
on an international G1 race in Dubai.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She seems driven not only by her desire to put
Tomakomai on the map, but also by her
determination to beat Copano Rickey.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hokko Tarumae's decision puts her on a path of
considerable bad luck, according to feng shui.
Copano Rickey regrets letting her go without
saying anything.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Copano Rickey's ominous prediction comes true
when Hokko Tarumae suffers a devastating loss
and returns in shambles. Soon after, she goes on
hiatus.
